title: 7 Herbal Teas For Difficulty Chewing
description: Echinacea purpurea teas contains alkylamides, glycosides, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Alkylamides, particularly echinacoside, have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling in the mouth and throat, making it easier to chew and swallow. Glycosides, like caftaric acid, have antioxidant properties that protect the mucous membranes from damage and promote healing.
